name: Snyk breadth — target="_blank" link without rel="noopener" (reverse tabnabbing)

provenance.note: Constructed snippet illustrating reverse tabnabbing — a target="_blank" anchor that drops rel="noopener noreferrer", letting the destination reach window.opener. Breadth supplement (spec §4.3) — lower realism, not an external-validity claim.

notes: Vulnerable (+) side removes rel="noopener noreferrer" from a cross-origin target="_blank" link; safe (-) side keeps it. Matches R-03 pattern; rel is a static literal so high confidence.
